title: Cobblemon Fossils Minusвҳ„пёҸвҳ пёҸ - A Fossils Plus Addon
description: An addon pack for Cobblemon Fossils Plus that restricts the special fossil revival pool to supported Fossil/Artificial species.
body:
# Fossils Minus вҳ„пёҸвҳ пёҸ вҖ“ Controlled Fossil Restoration for Cobblemon 


Fossils Minus is a modular datapack + resource pack suite that restricts [Cobblemon Fossils Plus вңЁрҹҰ–'s](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fossils-plus) special fossil restoration mechanic to species already supported for revival by the restoration machine. 

# вңҙпёҸ About this datapack 

FossilsPlus normally allows its special fossils (Shiny, HA, IV, Perfect) to generate any PokГ©mon species present in the game, including stage 1 and 2 PokГ©mon.

Fossils Minus restricts those modifiers so they only work when combined with valid fossil ingredients for thematic consistency. All supported recipes give stage 0 PokГ©mon.

## вһ• What this pack adds

This project adds over 100 targeted fossil restoration recipes (104вҖ“105, depending on ATM x MSD version) while preserving proper restoration tank visuals. It features;

рҹҺҜ Support for all base fossil PokГ©mon found in Cobblemon

рҹ§¬ Fully compatible with [Complete Galar Fossilmon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/complete-galar-fossilmon) (Note; uses the new version that replaces Dracodacentro with Dracocerato

рҹ’Ҙ Compatible with [ATM x MSD's](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) legendary recipes

рҹҸӣ Optionally compatible with [Legendary Monuments'](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-monuments) Tuft of Mew Hair

рҹ“ҡ Compatible with [Lost Lore's](https://modrinth.com/datapack/poketwo) clone species

рҹ‘Ғ Visually seamless with correct fetus display models where supported


## рҹҺҒ Included Modifier Types

For every supported fossil species, the following variants are added:

вңЁ Shiny Fossil

рҹҢҹ Hidden Ability Fossil

рҹ“Ҳ Perfect IV Fossil

рҹ’Һ Perfect Fossil (Shiny + 6Г—31 IVs)

<details>
<summary>рҹҡ« Standalone use of special fossils is disabled.</summary>

Though still possible through combining the special fossil with a рҹҡ« barrier block рҹҡ«

</details>


# рҹ‘ҫ Compatible Pokemon

Over 100 Recipes Added

Depending on which optional packs are enabled, this suite adds special fossil support for:


<details>
<summary>Core Fossil PokГ©mon</summary>

- Omanyte 
- Kabutops
- Aerodactyl
- Lileep
- Anorith
- Cranidos
- Shieldon
- Tirtouga
- Archen
- Tyrunt
- Amaura
- Dracozolt
- Dracovish
- Arctozolt
- Arctovish

</details>


<details>
<summary>Complete Galar Fossilmon</summary>


- Raptorzolt
- Dracocerato
- Dunkleovish
- Arctoplesio

вҡ пёҸ If you wish to use Dracodacentro, you'll have to replace the Dracocerato jsons manually. I may add a version to support this in a future update if enough people request it.

</details>


<details>
<summary>ATM x MSD PokГ©mon</summary>

- Mewtwo
- Genesect
- Type:Null

</details>

<details>
<summary>Lost Lore clone starters</summary>

- Bulbasaurtwo
- Charmandertwo
- Squirtletwo
</details>

Each special fossil modifier Г— species combination has its own targeted recipe that can be modified as you please.

Note: This pack does not add any new PokГ©mon, just its restoration recipes; to use an addon pack, you should install the corresponding mod that adds support for that PokГ©mon as well.



## рҹҰ  Correct Fetus Display Models

Using the included resource packs, the correct PokГ©mon fetus grows in the restoration tank for every supported recipe.

![A slumbering Aerodactyl!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10bd38cf24477761c59965bc2cd58a151d3054c0.png)


<details>
<summary>Supported restoration species visuals</summary>

- Omanyteвң…
- Kabutopsвң…
- Aerodactylвң…
- Lileepвң…
- Anorithвң…
- Cranidosвң…
- Shieldonвң…
- Tirtougaвң…
- Archenвң…
- Tyruntвң…
- Amauraвң…
- Dracozoltвң…
- Dracovishвң…
- Arctozoltвң…
- Arctovishвң…
- Raptorzoltвң…
- Dracoceratoвң…
- Dunkleovishвң…
- Arctoplesioвң…
- Mewtwoвң…
- Genesectвң…
- Type:NullвқҢ
- BulbasaurtwoвқҢ
- CharmandertwoвқҢ
- SquirtletwoвқҢ

</details>

The supported packs do not provide fetus models for the unsupported species. If this changes, I will add their alias support.

## рҹ“Ӣ How to use 

Just simply add the desired special fossil ingredient to the existing fossil recipe! For example;


<details>
<summary>Old Amber Fossil - Aerodactyl</summary>


![Vanilla Old Amber Fossil recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50fec5e39c60974be121ac38eddf05ef50e2494e.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Old Amber Fossil + Shiny Fossil - Shiny Aerodactyl</summary>

![Old Amber Fossil Shiny recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/028cec8e7a2ac48930c4b23b759d2eacec79e193.png)

![Shiny Aerodactyl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e2ab4fd3d64f02cc3b9cc4e766f59a835bf3900.png)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Old Amber Fossil + IV Fossil - Perfect IV Aerodactyl</summary>

![Old Amber Fossil Max IV recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7591b557569c11adf0ebda4a37b317d2bcba69c2.png)

![Max IV Aerodactyl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc19eb693b0e2718fa62be6e69f5c62b1b3e51cd.png)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Old Amber Fossil + HA Fossil - Hidden ability Aerodactyl</summary>

![Old Amber Fossil Hidden Ability Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a441b45c389adef55d21e9cbe6dfcaf75a416dd.png)

![Hidden Ability Aerodactyl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a60d2afc6522ae4d47df401646951d3a9bc7f08.png)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Old Amber Fossil + Perfect Fossil - Shiny Perfect IV Aerodactyl</summary>

![Perfect Old Amber Fossil recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a355095df1d7797084b3b22bcdee0d5bc1cbaea.png)

![Perfect Aerodactyl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee9f51f8b27f231bda7a6506c3f7eb730a2207c1.png)
</details>
  
## вҡ пёҸ Hidden Ability Notes

Some PokГ©mon do not have hidden abilities defined.

The following species currently, by default, do not have hidden abilities:

- Archen
- Genesect
- Type:Null

Hidden Ability recipes are still included for these PokГ©mon via:

- fp_ha_archen.json
- addon_ha_genesect.json
- addon_ha_typenull.json

These recipes exist to support custom server-side hidden ability additions and modded ability expansions.

If your server does not use custom hidden abilities, these files can be safely removed.

Removing them will prevent the Hidden Ability Fossil from being used to revive those PokГ©mon, so that nobody wastes a Hidden Ability Fossil unnecessarily.

# вҡҷпёҸ Technical details

This release is structured as modular packs:

## рҹ—ғпёҸ Required

- Core Datapack

- Core Fetus Resource Pack

## рҹҡҘ Optional Addons

- Complete Galar Fossilmon

- ATM x MSD (Vanilla version)

- ATM x MSD (LegendaryMonuments version)

- Lost Lore

You can enable only the integrations you use. Using addon packs that add recipes for PokГ©mon not present in your game may crash the game

### рҹҸҜ Legendary Monuments Support

An alternate ATM x MSD pack is included, where Mewtwo's resurrection requires:

- Nether Star

- Tuft of Mew Hair (LegendaryMonuments)

This overrides the Psychic Gem recipe when enabled for both the default recipe, and any fossils plus recipes. This feature was present in previous LM versions of ATM x MSD but has since been removed.

# рҹ–ҘпёҸ Installation

Extract the main download.

Place desired datapack zip(s) into:

world/datapacks/


Place the desired resource pack zip(s) into:

client resourcepacks folder
or

host as server resource pack

Run:

/reload


вҡ пёҸ Do not unzip the inner zip files.

## рҹ”§ Advanced: Combining Packs Into One

If you prefer a single unified datapack and/or resource pack instead of modular zips, you can merge them manually.

### Combining Datapacks

If you wish to combine these packs into one for cleaner organisation;

Unzip the datapacks you want to combine.

Merge their data/ folders together.

Keep only one pack.mcmeta at the root.

Re-zip the folder (do not nest folders).

Final structure should look like:

```
UnifiedPack.zip

в”ңв”Җв”Җ pack.mcmeta

в””в”Җв”Җ data/

    в””в”Җв”Җ cobblemon/

        в””в”Җв”Җ fossils/ 
```


вҡ пёҸ Important:

If combining ATM x MSD variants, choose EITHER the Vanilla or LegendaryMonuments version вҖ” not both.

### Combining Resource Packs

Unzip the resource packs you want to merge.

Merge their assets/ folders together.

Keep only one pack.mcmeta.

Re-zip the folder.

Final structure:

```
UnifiedResourcePack.zip

в”ңв”Җв”Җ pack.mcmeta

в””в”Җв”Җ assets/

    в””в”Җв”Җ cobblemon/

        в””в”Җв”Җ bedrock/
```

## рҹҢҗ Compatibility

Minecraft 1.21.1

[Cobblemon 1.7.3+](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)

[Cobblemon FossilsPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fossils-plus)

Optional: [Complete Galar Fossilmon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/complete-galar-fossilmon) V 1.3+

Optional: [ATM x MSD](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy)

Optional: [LegendaryMonuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-monuments)

Optional: [Lost Lore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/poketwo) 2.0/1.8

# рҹӨһ Future Plans
1. Dracodacentro support
2. Shiny fetus textures
3. Pre - Combined asset packs
4. Custom special fossil assets (if not supported by Fossils Plus already)
5. More recipe support (reach out on Cobblemon's Discord)
